text: Entering this space, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The bright lights and contemporary design invite me to explore, while the visible security and safety measures reassure me. Crossing into the exhibition, intellectual excitement awakens. The focus on research and development, and the themes of human interaction and innovation, inspire contemplation about our potential for growth and the creative ways we connect and coexist. I feel simultaneously small and expansive—reminded of the endless possibilities contained in both science and human imagination.
